title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Senior Consultant Posts
description: The National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Senior Consultant Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation can apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, appli...
